cues.text: Istanbul. The final of the Champions League. AC Milan, the aristocrats of European football, against Liverpool. Nobody here has any idea what they are about to witness.
Fifty two seconds! Paolo Maldini! Milan lead inside the first minute of the final!
Kaká slides it through — Crespo! Two nil Milan, and Liverpool are drowning.
Kaká again, a ball of outrageous vision — Crespo clips it over the keeper! Three nil at half time. Surely, surely this final is over.
And that's half time. AC Milan 3, Liverpool 3.
Riise crosses — GERRARD! Steven Gerrard! A lifeline for Liverpool, and listen to that noise!
Šmicer... from twenty five yards — IT'S IN! Two goals in two minutes! Liverpool believe, and Milan are shaking!
Gerrard is brought down — penalty! Alonso steps up... saved — ALONSO ON THE REBOUND! From three nil down to three three! The miracle of Istanbul is ON!
Carragher goes into the referee's book.
Baroš goes into the referee's book.
A big chance for Kaká... it won't count. AC Milan so close.
Extra time it is. Thirty more minutes to settle it.
Shevchenko must score... kept out! What a chance for AC Milan!
So it comes down to this. A penalty shoot-out will decide it.
Hamann steps up... and scores. 0 1.
Pirlo steps up... SAVED! Kept out!
Cissé steps up... and scores. 0 2.
Tomasson steps up... and scores. 1 2.
John Arne Riise steps up... SAVED! Kept out!
Kaká steps up... and scores. 2 2.
Smicer steps up... and scores. 2 3.
Liverpool have won the Champions League! From three nil down at half time — the miracle of Istanbul is complete!
